degraded: test_finalize_iterate.py::test_run_is_idempotent failed once under the full shared-suite run (cross-file ordering flake): it passes in isolation and as its own file (20/20), does not import any module this iterate changed, and reproduces independently of this diff.

surface_verification.justification: Internal defect repair: record-boundary delegation in Python event-log readers + churn_merge validator. No web/CLI/API behaviour surface — every changed function is a pure library reader/validator. No client/**, API route, store mutation, or message contract touched.

behaviors.behavior: resolve_run_id recovers run_started records from a merge=union concatenated line (latest wins), not the session fallback
check_a7_adopted_event PASSes when the adopted event is second on a concatenated line (inverted failure fixed)
validate_adoption._validate_events recovers the adopted count from a concatenated line (adopt-side parity)
routing._newest_work_commit returns the newest work_completed when it is second on a concatenated line; not-stale end-to-end
recovery stays partial (a valid record ahead of an unrecoverable fragment is still recovered) at every converted site
converted readers return only JSON objects; a bare scalar line is a fragment and no site crashes on .get()
churn_merge.validate_events_text finds work_completed second on a concatenated line (no false check_events_has_commit failure in integrate_main)
validate_events_text does not flag a fully-recoverable concatenated line as corrupt, still flags an unrecoverable fragment AND a bare scalar (reporting change pinned)
the merge VALIDATOR (churn_merge) and a converted READER (check_a7) both observe the run after a real merge=union merge propagates a concatenated line
anti-vacuity: a genuinely absent adopted/run/work event still fails (recovery does not make any gate toothless)
a leading partial line from routing's bounded tail read never surfaces as a record / becomes the newest

test_completeness.note: 9 ACs (AC1-AC7 + AC-CM1/AC-CM2). cross_component (churn_merge) integration coverage supplied by the AC7 category:integration behavior. observability.py declined (gitignored telemetry, non-union-merged) introduces no behavior so it is not enumerated.
